title: Wholesome Canadian Whiptop Petit Pois Bake
description: A cozy sour and pillowy dish featuring petit pois baked wood-fired-style with a dash-friendly twist.
instructions: Preheat your wood-fired oven or grill at high heat.
Wash and peel the sweet potato and carrot. Dice them into small pieces.
In a large bowl, mix diced potatoes and carrots with olive oil, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.
Gently fold in the crushed petit pois until evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to your preheated oven or grill. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over top for a burst of freshness.
Serve hot as a side dish with crusty bread.
